title: core/pow: mine_token loops 2^64 times then panics if relay sends impossible difficulty
description: core/src/pow.rs:220-248 / core/src/transport.rs: `mine_token(diff=200)` iterates all 2^64 nonce values without finding a solution (200 leading zero bits is impossible in SHA-256), then hits unreachable!() and panics. A malicious relay sending an impossibly high difficulty would hang the client's mining task for 2^64 iterations then crash it. Fix: validate `diff <= 60` in transport.rs before spawning the mining task and return a clear error if the relay sends an unreasonable difficulty.
